button_style_hint: This style applies colour to the button (Bot API 9.4).
button_text_too_long: {e_error} Button text too long. Max {max} characters.
button_url_prompt: Enter the URL (must start with https://):
button_webapp_prompt: Enter the WebApp URL (must start with https://):
buttons_limit_reached: Plan limit: max {max} button(s). Upgrade for more.
effect_picker_title: Choose Broadcast Effect The selected animation will play for each recipient when the broadcast arrives.
history_resend_loaded: {e_success} Broadcast loaded. Adjust options and send.
history_title: {e_broadcast} Broadcast History Each row shows the send time, message type, and delivery results.
compose_prompt_msg: {e_broadcast} New Broadcast Send your content: • Text — type a message (HTML formatting supported) • Media — photo, video, sticker, animation, document, audio, voice, or video note Send now:
media_compose_prompt: Send any media — photo, video, sticker, animation, document, audio, voice, or video note:
media_unsupported: {e_warning} Unsupported type. Send text or any media: photo, video, sticker, animation, document, audio, voice, or video note.
menu_title:
{e_broadcast} Broadcast Send a message to all your subscribers at once.
Available formats: • Text — plain text with HTML formatting • Media — photo, video, sticker, document, audio, animation, or video note with an optional caption • Poll — send a native Telegram poll or quiz • Paid Media — blurred content subscribers unlock with Telegram Stars (Advanced+)
no_subscribers:
{e_warning} You don't have any subscribers yet.

Share your bot link to get subscribers!
paid_media_compose_body: Send a photo or video — subscribers will see a blurred preview and pay Stars to unlock the full content.
paid_media_price_body: Enter the number of Telegram Stars subscribers must pay to unlock this content (1–2500):
paid_media_type_error: {e_error} Send a photo or video for paid media.
paid_star_invalid: Enter a whole number between 5 and 2,500.
paid_star_prompt: How many Telegram Stars should subscribers pay? (5 – 2,500):
photo_compose: Photo Broadcast Send me a photo you want to broadcast. After sending the photo, I'll ask for an optional caption. Send your photo now:
preview_self_failed_toast: ❌ Could not send preview. Try again.
protect_off_body: Copy Protection OFF Subscribers can forward and save this broadcast normally.
protect_on_body: Copy Protection ON Subscribers cannot forward or save this broadcast.
sched_confirm_hint: Tap Confirm Schedule to queue this broadcast, or choose another option below.
sched_confirmed_hint: Tap below to review or cancel it before it sends.
sched_in_past: That time is in the past. Enter a future date and time.
sched_invalid_format: Invalid format. Use DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM — e.g. 28/05/2026 14:00
sched_none: The broadcast will be sent immediately.
sched_prompt_body:
Enter UTC date and time in format: DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM

Example: 28/05/2026 14:00
sched_queue_empty: No scheduled broadcasts. To schedule a broadcast, compose one and tap Send to All, then pick a time.
sched_queue_title: {e_broadcast} Scheduled Broadcasts These broadcasts are queued and will send automatically at the scheduled time. Tap any item to view details or cancel.
sched_quick_body: Pick a delay — calculated from right now (UTC). Use Custom to enter an exact UTC date and time.
sched_too_far: Cannot schedule more than 30 days in advance.
text_compose: Text Broadcast Send me the text message you want to broadcast to all subscribers. Format your message using Telegram's built-in text formatting (select text → tap Bold/Italic/etc). HTML tags like bold, italic, and code are also supported. Send your message now:
video_compose: Video Broadcast Send me a video you want to broadcast. After sending the video, I'll ask for an optional caption. Send your video now:
